title: 7 Money Habits That Prove a Godly Man Runs His Life
caption:
7 money habits that prove a godly man runs his life. Not his impulses, and not his bank app.

Your bank statement is a discipleship record. It shows exactly who's on the throne on a Tuesday afternoon when nobody's watching. A man who budgets, gives first, and waits out the impulse buy isn't just being smart. He's proving his money doesn't run him.

You don't need a raise to start. You need a plan for the next dollar that lands in your account.

Save this one for the week your bank app is louder than your budget.

#faith #discipline #christianman #manofgod #selfcontrol #stewardship #financialdiscipline #christianfinance
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
